title: Standardize configurations with CMakePresets
description: Capture common configure and build settings in CMakePresets.json so contributors and CI use identical, reproducible invocations.
body: Use when the project needs consistent builds across people and CI, or when configure commands have grown long and error-prone. Do not rely on each contributor remembering a string of -D flags. Actions: define configurePresets and buildPresets with the cache variables, generator, and toolchain; invoke with cmake --preset; reference the same presets from CI. Validation signals include cmake --preset reproducing the intended build on a fresh checkout. Risk boundary: undocumented ad hoc flags drift between environments, so move them into versioned presets rather than personal scripts.
